name: Animal Liberation
summary: Long-running Australian animal advocacy organisation focused on ending institutionalised animal cruelty.
description: Relevant for farmed-animal advocacy, public campaigning and reform work aimed at institutions where animal suffering is normalised.
alignment: Listed as a related advocacy organisation with overlapping concern for farmed-animal welfare, transparency and legislative change.
